synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2224 Critical: Oracle Linux 9 keylime security update
description:

full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2224

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2224.html
